suggestions.title: External Link Monitoring
suggestions.description: Extend broken-link-fixer to track external link health over time and alert on repeated failures.
suggestions.implementation: Add external link history to ai-broken-link-fixer.cjs

suggestions.title: Test Coverage Improvement Agent
suggestions.description: Agent that identifies untested critical paths and suggests or generates tests.
suggestions.benefit: Improves test coverage from current baseline

suggestions.title: Weekly Dependency Security Audit
suggestions.description: Run npm audit and auto-fix low-risk vulnerabilities, report high/critical.
suggestions.implementation: Add to cron: 0 3 * * 0 cd $ZION_ROOT && npm audit fix --audit-level=low
suggestions.benefit: Keeps dependencies secure with minimal risk

suggestions.title: Sitemap Validation on Deploy
suggestions.description: Add sitemap validation step to CI/CD pipeline before deploy.
suggestions.implementation: Add npm run sitemap:validate to ci-cd.yml

suggestions.title: Report Aggregator Agent
suggestions.description: Agent that aggregates all automation reports into a single dashboard JSON/HTML.

suggestions.title: Blog Date Metadata Check
suggestions.description: Ensure all blog posts have valid date metadata and suggest updates for posts >18 months old.
suggestions.implementation: Add to ai-content-organizer or create dedicated script
